title: The Weekly Challenge - 173
task1_desc: You are given a positive integer, `$n`.
task1_body:
You are given a positive integer, `$n`. Write a script to find out if the given number is `Esthetic Number`.
> An esthetic number is a positive integer where every adjacent digit differs from its neighbour by 1.
For example, 5456 is an esthetic number as |5 - 4| = |4 - 5| = |5 - 6| = 1 120 is not an esthetic numner as |1 - 2| != |2 - 0| != 1
task2_desc: Write a script to generate first `10 members` of `Sylvester's sequence`. For more informations, please refer to the [**wikipedia page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sylvester%27s_sequence).
task2_body:
Write a script to generate first `10 members` of `Sylvester's sequence`. For more informations, please refer to the [**wikipedia page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sylvester%27s_sequence).
